name: Tofu and Broccoli Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Broccoli, cut into bite-size pieces
1 lb Tofu, fresh (bean curd), cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. For the sauce, stir together water, sherry, soy sauce, cornstarch, grated ginger, and crushed red pepper in a bowl. Set aside.
2. Spray a cold wok or large skillet with non-stick coating. Preheat over medium heat.
3. Add garlic to the pan and stir-fry for 15 seconds.
4. Add broccoli and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
5. Add onion and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
6. Add bean sprouts and stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Push the vegetables from the center of the wok or skillet to the sides.
8. Stir sauce into the pan, then add it to the center of the wok or skillet.
9. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly, about 1 minute.
10. Add tofu and stir-fry for an additional minute.
11. Stir vegetables into the sauce and tofu mixture.
12. Serve with hot cooked brown rice.
